title: dictamnus albus var. caucasicus
intro: Dictamnus albus var. caucasicus, also known as Caucasian Breaking Heart or Caucasian Dittany, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Caucasus. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Caucasian Breaking Heart include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote the healing of wounds, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and is used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
